Places I Can Go.name: Where Am I? Map
Places I Can Go.overview: Students create a map showing places like 'home,' 'school,' and 'market,' labeling each with 'I'm at...' sentences.
Places I Can Go.general_objective: Develop spatial awareness and location vocabulary.
Places I Can Go.technology_integration: Use a digital mapping tool to label familiar places.

Places I Can Go.name: Digital Map Tour
Places I Can Go.overview: Students create a digital tour of familiar places using an online map tool and label them with 'I'm at' phrases.
Places I Can Go.general_objective: Develop digital literacy and location presentation skills.

Places I Can Go.name: Location Drawing Project
Places I Can Go.overview: Students draw pictures of familiar places and write sentences like 'I'm at the park.'
Places I Can Go.general_objective: Develop artistic expression and location vocabulary integration.
Places I Can Go.technology_integration: Create digital drawings with text labels.

A Polite Request.name: Polite Request Poster
A Polite Request.overview: Students create posters with polite requests (e.g., 'Can I have a pencil, please?') and responses (e.g., 'Sorry, I can't help.').
A Polite Request.general_objective: Develop polite language skills and social awareness.
A Polite Request.technology_integration: Use poster-making app for digital versions.

A Polite Request.name: Request Role-Play
A Polite Request.overview: Students role-play, making polite requests and responses using phrases like 'Can I have...' and 'Sorry, I can't...'.
A Polite Request.general_objective: Develop verbal communication skills in social contexts.

A Polite Request.name: Digital Polite Phrase Poster
A Polite Request.overview: Students use a poster-making app to design posters with polite phrases.
A Polite Request.general_objective: Develop digital design skills and language reinforcement.
A Polite Request.technology_integration: Create and print digital polite phrase posters.

Shopping at the Market.name: Shopping List Game
Shopping at the Market.overview: Students make a shopping list using pictures of fruits and vegetables, labeling quantities with numbers (e.g., 'three bananas').
Shopping at the Market.general_objective: Develop numeracy and shopping vocabulary integration.
Shopping at the Market.technology_integration: Use tablet to create digital shopping list.

Shopping at the Market.name: Shopping Role-Play
Shopping at the Market.overview: Students role-play a shopping scenario, practicing using numbers and requesting different items.
Shopping at the Market.general_objective: Develop practical language skills for real-life situations.
Shopping at the Market.technology_integration: Use calculator app for price calculations.

Shopping at the Market.name: Digital Shopping List
Shopping at the Market.overview: Students use a tablet to create a digital shopping list with pictures and number labels.
Shopping at the Market.general_objective: Develop digital organization skills and vocabulary reinforcement.

Let's Go Shopping!.name: Classroom Scavenger Hunt
Let's Go Shopping!.overview: Students go on a scavenger hunt, finding and labeling classroom objects using prepositions (e.g., 'The book is on the table.').
Let's Go Shopping!.general_objective: Develop observation skills and preposition use.
specific_objectives: Find objects based on location clues
Let's Go Shopping!.technology_integration: Use tablets to photograph found objects.

Let's Go Shopping!.name: Object Sorting Game
Let's Go Shopping!.overview: Students organize classroom items into categories and label them with prepositions.
Let's Go Shopping!.general_objective: Develop classification skills and spatial vocabulary.

Let's Go Shopping!.name: Digital Object Finder
Let's Go Shopping!.overview: Students use digital devices to photograph classroom objects and label them with prepositions.
Let's Go Shopping!.general_objective: Develop technology skills and vocabulary application.

Time for Exercise.name: Weather & Feelings Journal
Time for Exercise.overview: Students keep a journal, drawing the weather each day and describing how it makes them feel (e.g., 'I'm happy.').
Time for Exercise.general_objective: Develop emotional awareness and weather-feeling connections.
Time for Exercise.technology_integration: Use weather app to track and match weather with feelings.

Time for Exercise.name: Weather Role-Play
Time for Exercise.overview: Students role-play different weather scenarios and describe their emotions (e.g., 'It's sunny. I'm happy.').
Time for Exercise.general_objective: Develop expressive skills and emotion-weather vocabulary.

Time for Exercise.name: Digital Weather Log
Time for Exercise.overview: Students use a weather app to track and match daily weather with their feelings.
Time for Exercise.general_objective: Develop digital tracking skills and self-awareness.
Time for Exercise.technology_integration: Use apps for weather and emotion tracking.

Recycling for Our World.name: Nature Observation Journal
Recycling for Our World.overview: Students observe nature around school, writing sentences using 'can' and 'can't' to describe their abilities (e.g., 'I can see a tree.').
Recycling for Our World.general_objective: Develop observation skills and ability expression.
Recycling for Our World.technology_integration: Use nature journaling app for documentation.

Recycling for Our World.name: Outdoor Role-Play
Recycling for Our World.overview: Students role-play outdoor activities using sentences like 'I can relax.' or 'I can't hear the birds.'
Recycling for Our World.general_objective: Develop language skills in outdoor contexts.

Recycling for Our World.name: Digital Nature Journal
Recycling for Our World.overview: Students use a nature journaling app to document observations and feelings about nature.
Recycling for Our World.general_objective: Develop digital documentation skills and nature appreciation.

Our Traditional Style of Dress.name: Favorite Food Survey
Our Traditional Style of Dress.overview: Students conduct a class survey asking peers about their favorite foods (e.g., 'What's your favorite food?') and create a chart showing the results.
Our Traditional Style of Dress.general_objective: Develop research skills and food vocabulary.
Our Traditional Style of Dress.technology_integration: Use digital survey tool to gather and graph preferences.

Our Traditional Style of Dress.name: Food Recipe Book
Our Traditional Style of Dress.overview: Students create a simple recipe book by drawing pictures of their favorite foods and writing sentences like 'I like sancocho.'
Our Traditional Style of Dress.general_objective: Develop creative expression and food vocabulary.

Our Traditional Style of Dress.name: Digital Food Survey
Our Traditional Style of Dress.overview: Students use a digital survey tool to gather and make a graph of types of food preferences.
Our Traditional Style of Dress.general_objective: Develop digital research and data analysis skills.
Our Traditional Style of Dress.technology_integration: Conduct digital surveys and create graphs.
